specialtiesKey: Boat Surveying & Inspection,Diving & Underwater Services,Marine AC & Climate Control,Marine Plumbing & Sanitation

content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running, Season After Season
content.about:
Ben's Boatworks is a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services — from boat surveying and underwater inspections to climate control and plumbing — and we bring that same hands-on commitment to every boat we work on across South Florida and the surrounding waters.

At Ben's Boatworks, we handle the full spectrum of what your boat needs to stay safe, comfortable, and seaworthy. Our boat surveying and inspection services give buyers, sellers, and owners a clear picture of a vessel's true condition. Our diving and underwater services tackle what you can't see from the dock — hull inspections, prop work, and more. We keep cabins livable with marine AC and climate control installations and repairs, and we make sure everything flows properly with thorough marine plumbing and sanitation work. These aren't side offerings — they're what we do every day.

We serve boat owners throughout South Florida, covering a wide range of coastal communities, marinas, and anchorages within a 60-mile radius of Annapolis, MD. Whether you're a liveaboard, a weekend cruiser, or a first-time buyer trying to make a smart purchase, Ben's Boatworks is the kind of marine partner that treats your boat like it matters — because we know it does. Your vessel represents a significant investment, and we take that seriously.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, diving services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call us today.

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey gives you an accurate, documented assessment of a vessel's structural integrity, mechanical systems, and overall condition. Whether you're buying, selling, or renewing insurance, a professional inspection helps you make informed decisions and avoid costly surprises down the line.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater services cover the critical work that keeps a hull clean, safe, and performing efficiently below the waterline. From prop inspections and zinc replacements to hull cleaning and underwater damage assessments, these dives address what standard dockside maintenance simply can't reach.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning and climate control systems require specialized knowledge to install, diagnose, and repair correctly in a saltwater environment. We service seawater-cooled and self-contained marine AC units to keep cabin temperatures comfortable and systems running efficiently year-round.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Proper marine plumbing and sanitation systems are essential for vessel safety, compliance, and onboard comfort. We handle everything from through-hull fittings and raw water systems to holding tanks, marine heads, and MSD installations — making sure everything is sealed, functional, and up to standard.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection for prospective buyers
Underwater hull cleaning and barnacle removal between haul-outs
Marine AC system diagnosis, repair, or new unit installation aboard vessel
Holding tank replacement and marine sanitation system overhaul
Prop inspection and zinc anode replacement via dockside dive
Through-hull fitting inspection and raw water plumbing repair
Insurance or damage survey following a grounding or collision event
